series_metadata.series_description: The program provide Medicaid reimbursement for service provided to Medicaid eligible children ages 3 to 21 who receive services at school through an Individualized Education Plan. Allows reimbursement for cost for direct service provided by licensed individuals, administrative activities and transportation services. Records to include service utilization and fiscal reports, interagency agreements, program summaries, provide list, State Plan amendments.
